listings.title: Protection Racket Rolling Drum Hardware Case Bag EXCLNT But.. 28x14x10
listings.body: If bought NEW, this costs $320 - Get it here for half! SEE ALL PHOTOS! *28" x 14" x 10" hardware bag w/wheels & retractable handle. Top-Bottom-and Mid Case Handles for easy load in. *19" x 7" x 2" zipped pocket comes as standard on this size.   *(28" x 14" x 10" Internal) *Bottom handle  frayed from being pulled. Black Duct Tape will save the day. *Two white scuffs on outside pouch. *Some scrapes on wheel base plastic SEE ALL PHOTOS! This is a fantastic shape case/bag with wheels. No smells, no issues with it at all EXCEPT the bottom handle is frayed from being pulled.  Used very few times. Wheels & retractable pull are fantastic. Protection Racket bags are known for their robust construction. The 5028W-09 features a tough, waterproof Racketex exterior and a Propadd foam interior, offering excellent protection against impacts and moisture. The heavy-duty zippers and reinforced stitching ensure it can withstand the rigors of frequent travel, keeping your valuable hardware safe. The 5028W-09 is perfect for gigging drummers, studio musicians, or anyone who frequently transports a significant amount of drum hardware. Its wheeled design reduces strain, while the durable construction protects your gear. It's also great for organized storage, keeping your stands and accessories together and ready for your next performance. This bag is designed for effortless transport, especially when loaded with heavy hardware. It features sturdy, smooth-rolling wheels and a comfortable, ergonomic handle, allowing you to easily pull it across various surfaces. There are also strong carrying handles for lifting, making it convenient for loading into vehicles or navigating stairs. The Protection Racket hardware cases now come with skate wheels that are stronger, more durable and designed for smooth, no wobble transportation. The new retractable handle also makes for easier handling and maneuverability. This 28" model has a maximum weight load of 30kgs. All hardware cases are equipped with 2 x internal webbing straps for strapping down of packed hardware.
